creator: thowe@bendtel.net
text:
I am having this issue with 8.0-RELEASE amd64 CD1

I tried the install multiple times.  I tried the main FTP server, ftp4,
and ftp4.usa.openbsd.org, but all timed out.  It appears to be unable
to resolve the name, as if it is not using the DNS settings I gave it.
I confirmed I have network connectivity to the machine from a different
subnet, so IP and gateway are OK.  Also moved outside the firewall just
to test that (shouldn't matter for DNS resolution) but it always just
times out on name resolution.

All other settings checked as well...  I even did an ftp install of
OpenBSD just to make sure all network hardware was OK.
